summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The shard has no shared canonical; each hydrated PR is classified independently. No GitHub mutations are planned because the job is plan mode and merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked.

actions.reason: Standalone maintainer-owned draft PR; no close, merge, or fix action is available or justified.
Standalone draft maintainer PR; keep it out of closeout because no duplicate, superseding PR, or low-signal basis is hydrated.
Standalone contributor fix with failing proof/check evidence; classify independently rather than close or merge.
Substantial standalone contributor PR; no inventory closeout basis and merge is blocked by job frontmatter.
Feature PR with product/security-boundary-adjacent labels but no true security-sensitive finding in the artifact; keep independent for maintainer review.
Standalone maintainer feature PR awaiting author follow-up; no dedupe or closure action is supported.
Focused maintainer draft PR; classify independently because no shared canonical or closeout basis exists.
Standalone contributor fix; merge is blocked by job frontmatter and no duplicate/superseded evidence is hydrated.
Standalone small contributor fix with failing proof check; keep independent for maintainer review rather than close.
Focused maintainer draft PR; no closure, merge, or fix recommendation is permitted or justified.
Already merged before this plan run; no mutation should be emitted.
Standalone maintainer draft PR; not a duplicate or close candidate in this shard.
Small standalone provider/failover fix with incomplete check hydration; keep independent rather than merge or close.
Standalone feature PR with conflicts; classify independently for maintainer/author follow-up.
Standalone contributor documentation/automation PR; no closeout basis in this inventory shard.
Substantial standalone contributor fix with incomplete review/check hydration; keep independent, not closable or merge-ready.
